description: Networking IP allocate POSTs linode_id/type/public once confirmed. public is required by the API (no default) so both languages reject a missing public rather than injecting one. The no-confirm text and other validation messages diverge between languages (see report).

cases.name: allocates an IP for a linode
rejects an invalid type
cases.expect_error: type must be one of: ipv4

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This allocates a new IP address which may incur charges. Set confirm=true to proceed.
